title: KosmoSketch ToolAdapter Contract

source_context.request: KosmoSketch als ToolAdapter registrieren, target_tool und Entwurf-Keywords festlegen, Approval- und Artifact-Formen fuer KosmoOrbit/KosmoZentrale bestaetigen.

job_contract.routing: POST /router/plan routes prompt keywords to department Entwurf and target_tool kosmo-draw.kosmosketch.
job_contract.brain_adapter: local_brain or codex placeholder until local Kosmo is available.
job_contract.panic_endpoint: POST /panic/stop-all must stop or block every executable adapter path.

approval_contract.commit_rule: No BIM, Bridge, IFC or 2D regeneration write before human approval.

artifact_contract.name: kosmosketch-intent-preview
artifact_contract.purpose: SketchIntent, confidence, clarifying questions, proposed edit operations and preview diff.

artifact_contract.name: kosmosketch-approved-commit
artifact_contract.purpose: Approved model commit output, Bridge payload, IFC or regenerated 2D package.

artifact_contract.name: kosmosketch-human-review-pack
artifact_contract.purpose: Human-readable review summary for project lead, design architect and owner.

promotion_requirements: Owner bestaetigt target_tool String und Aliases.
KosmoZentrale bestaetigt JobCreate-, Approval- und Artifact-Formen.
KosmoDraw bestaetigt headless Einstieg code/tools/kosmosketch_job.py interpret/apply.
Review-Gate bleibt fuer jede Modellveraenderung aktiv.
Panic Stop und Audit Trail sind vor executable Adapter getestet.
Keine Kundendaten oder echten Projektwrites im ersten Adapter-Smoke.
next_actions: KosmoSketch ToolAdapter in KosmoOrbit sichtbar pruefen.
Nach Gruenstand den Contract an KosmoDraw/KosmoZentrale spiegeln.
Erst danach einen lokalen nicht-schreibenden Adapter-Smoke mit Testdaten vorbereiten.
